headline: Top WallStreetBets Mentions This Weekend: GME, TSLA, AMC, AMD, TWTR, ARKK, LUNA, PLTR, WEAT, SOFI
Tesla Model 3 Turned Into Tank: Would Elon Musk Approve?
summary:
One of the most popular electric vehicles of all-time was turned into a tank thanks to the customization work of a popular YouTube channel.

What Happened: A Tesla Model 3 was turned into a tank by The Real Life Guys, a popular German YouTube channel.

headline: A Lunch Date About Hydrogen Airplanes Led To The Creation Of The Tesla We Know Today
summary: Some Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) fans may know the story of how a lunch date led to the formation of the company as we know it today. For others, the story, which was reshared by Tesla co-founders JB Straubel and Elon Musk, may be new.

headline: Married With Children Could Be Coming Back To Television Soon, But This Time As A Cartoon
summary: One of the most famous sitcoms of the 1990s is likely headed back to television, this time the show will have a much different appearance.

headline: Acquiring This EV Maker Could Help Turn Apple's Car Visions Into Reality
summary: Apple, Inc.'s (NASDAQ: AAPL) self-driving car project has been a non-starter, and Project Titan, the team which is responsible for its development, has seen a mass exodus of personnel.

headline: Elon Musk Is Hoping To Visit Indonesia Later This Year: What That Means For SpaceX, Tesla
summary: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) chief executive officer Elon Musk may be visiting Indonesia later this year to consider potential investment opportunities, according to a Bloomberg report.

headline: 'Doctor Strange' Tops Box Office With $61M; 'Firestarter' Is A Non-Starter With Audiences
summary: “Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness” was the top attraction at the U.S. weekend box office for the second consecutive week, generating $61 million in ticket sales from 4,534 theaters.

headline: Netflix Working On Adding Livestreaming Content: Report
summary: Netflix Inc (NASDAQ: NFLX) is working on offering livestream content to its customers, according to a report from Deadline.

headline: How You Can Win Free NFTs During Sunday's Billboard Music Awards
summary: A partnership between PepsiCo (NYSE: PEP) and the Billboard Music Awards will see viewers of the award show having the chance to live mint non-fungible tokens.

headline: Ray Dalio's Hedge Fund Exits Tesla In Q1, Doubles Down On These Chinese EV Players Instead

headline: Jim Cramer Calls Cathie Wood The 'Kiss Of Death' And Tells Viewers To Stay Away From Her Latest Stock Pick
summary: CNBC personality and show host Jim Cramer is well-known for his outspoken opinions on stocks and people. He is also known for sometimes flip-flopping on his viewpoints, which is likely the case with his opinion of Ark Funds CEO Cathie Wood.

headline: Elon Musk On Twitter Algorithm: 'You Are Being Manipulated' And Here's How To Fix It
summary:
Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk has offered three easy steps to his followers to fix the Twitter Inc (NYSE: TWTR) feed.

In a recent tweet, he said the Twitter algorithms manipulate people without their notice.

headline: @elonmusk Tweeted: Twitter legal just called to complain that I violated their NDA by revealing the bot check sample size is 100! This actually happened.
